title: Level the Print Bed
description: After power-off and cooling, level the FDM bed with a paper-drag baseline, adjustment pass, and re-test.

title: 3D Print 10 Benchies
description: Build a reliable first production batch of 10 Benchies with checkpoint notes and recovery steps.

title: 3D Print 100 Benchies
description: Scale to a 100-Benchy fleet with production evidence, quality checkpoints, and recovery loops.

title: 3D Print 25 Benchies
description: Build a fleet of 25 Benchies with a stable production plan, quality checks, and recovery loops.

title: Witness a Blob of Death
description: Skipping a first-layer check lets a failed Z homing extrude in mid-air, engulfing the nozzle in molten plastic.

title: Print a Cable Clip
description: Reduce clutter by printing cable clips with setup evidence, fit checks, and a recovery loop.

title: Print a Calibration Cube
description: Print a 20 mm calibration cube with baseline measurements, tuning adjustments, and retest evidence.

title: Swap Filament
description: Swap to green PLA on your entry-level FDM printer with goggles, wire cutters, and a 10 g purge.

title: Clear a Clogged Nozzle
description: Heat and clean the nozzle to restore smooth extrusion.

title: Fix a Clogged Nozzle
description: Disassemble your printer after a blob of death from skipping the first layer to unclog or replace the nozzle.

title: Print a Phone Stand
description: Print and fit-check a phone stand with measured angle and clearance thresholds.

title: Tune Retraction Settings
description: Print a single Benchy while adjusting retraction to reduce stringing.

title: Print a Spool Holder
description: Keep filament tidy by printing a simple spool holder.

title: Set up your first 3D printer
description: Accept Sydney's offer of a 3D printer, and learn how to set it up for use in your space exploration adventure.

title: Print a Temperature Tower
description: Find the ideal nozzle temperature by printing a simple calibration tower.

title: Tighten the X-axis Belt
description: Keep your prints sharp by safely tightening a loose X-axis belt.

title: Install an aquarium light
description: Install LED lighting with a safe photoperiod, verify plant-response evidence, and recover from stress signs before normal operation.

title: Balance aquarium pH
description: Capture a baseline pH reading, dose buffer safely, then re-test and log a stable window before declaring the tank recovered.

title: Breed your guppies
description: Stage fry cover and feeding, then prove brood health with water-parameter checks before graduating juveniles.

title: Rinse Sponge Filter
description: Capture pre-rinse flow evidence, rinse in dechlorinated water, and verify restored gentle flow before closing maintenance.

title: Add Floating Plants
description: Rinse guppy grass in dechlorinated water, then float it so it soaks up excess nutrients and shelters fry.

title: Set up an aquarium for a goldfish
description: Stage a goldfish habitat, verify safety checks, and resolve early stress signals before declaring the setup stable.

title: Add guppies
description: Introduce colorful guppies with staged acclimation, stress handling, and post-release verification.

title: Install an aquarium heater
description: Install a 150 W heater in a Walstad tank, verify safe stability, and use rollback or lockout recovery when readings drift or hardware risk appears.

title: Log Water Parameters
description: Run a full liquid test panel, classify anomalies by severity, and log complete records with a deterministic corrective/retest loop.

title: Catch a fish with a net
description: Use an aquarium net to move a fish safely during cleaning.

title: Check aquarium pH
description: Capture a pH strip reading, interpret against safe bounds, and re-test if the tank is out of range.

title: Move the Walstad tank
description: Atlas helps you lift the empty 80 L Walstad aquarium onto a sturdy stand. Clear the path, lift with your legs and keep the glass supported.

title: Add dwarf shrimp
description: Introduce hardy shrimp with drip acclimation to keep the tank clean and water stable.

title: Install a sponge filter
description: Install and verify gentle biological filtration with evidence gates and a contamination recovery loop.

title: Attach Aquarium Thermometer
description: Attach a stick-on strip thermometer outside the aquarium glass to monitor water temperature.

title: Top Off Evaporated Water
description: Use a siphon and dechlorinated water to restore level safely, then verify stable conditions.

title: Set up a Walstad tank
description: Create a low-tech planted aquarium using the Walstad method.

title: Perform a partial water change
description: Swap out a quarter of the tank water for conditioned tap water to keep fish healthy.

title: Test water parameters
description: Record a full liquid test panel, interpret threshold bounds, and run corrective action with a retest loop before stocking sensitive livestock.

title: Locate the Andromeda Galaxy
description: Use a planisphere star chart, a red flashlight and a basic telescope to locate our neighboring galaxy while preserving night vision.

title: Watch the Aurora
description: Pick a safe aurora window, pack red light and layers, and log what you spot.

title: Assemble a Simple Telescope
description: Use 50 mm and 20 mm magnifying lenses, masking tape, a cardboard mailing tube and a camera tripod to build a simple refractor for viewing Jupiter's moons. Work in the shade and never aim at the Sun.

title: Split a Binary Star
description: Use charting and focus checks to split Albireo, verify interpretation, and recover safely when seeing is poor.

title: Track a Visiting Comet
description: Build a repeatable observing plan, log comet position across nights, and recover safely when visibility drops.

title: Map the Constellations
description: Build a seasonal star-hop map, verify pattern recognition with evidence, and recover safely when visibility drops.

title: Spot the ISS
description: Plan an ISS pass, capture an observation artifact, and use weather/glare recovery with a scheduled follow-up when needed.

title: Photograph the ISS
description: Capture an ISS long-exposure streak, score shot quality against thresholds, and run deterministic corrective retests.

title: Track Jupiter's Moons
description: Track Jupiter's four Galilean moons across multiple sessions with logged evidence, safety checks, and a recovery loop for poor seeing.

title: Measure Light Pollution
description: Run an Orion star-count baseline, interpret visibility bands, and recover with safer fallback locations.

title: Photograph a Lunar Eclipse
description: Capture images of the Moon as it moves through Earth's shadow.

title: Document a Meteor Shower

title: Locate the North Star
description: Find Polaris via two route options, record a navigation artifact, and recover safely when conditions drift.

title: Observe the Moon
description: Use a basic telescope, mission logbook, quill, ink and red flashlight to sketch lunar craters safely.

title: Observe the Orion Nebula
description: Run a structured Orion session with fallback paths, logged evidence, and weather-safe recovery loops.

title: Planetary Alignment
description: Document a planetary lineup with a route plan, logged evidence, and safety-first recovery loops.

title: Track a Satellite Pass
description: Plan and track a satellite pass with weather fallback, safety preflight, anomaly classification, and logged evidence.

title: Spot Saturn's Rings
description: Plan and execute a Saturn observing session with evidence logging, fallback routing, and safe retry handling.

title: Capture Star Trails
description: Use long-exposure photography to capture star trails with logged pass criteria and recovery loops.

title: Sketch Sunspots
description: Use safe solar projection to capture a sunspot sketch, log interpretation notes, and recover cleanly when projection quality is poor.

title: Observe Venus's Phases
description: Use a planisphere and basic telescope to plan, view, and sketch Venus's shifting phase.

title: Dilute Hydrochloric Acid Safely
description: Compute target molarity, pre-chill dilution glassware, then dilute HCl in an ice bath with staged additions and verification.

title: Neutralize an Acid Spill
description: Contain an acid spill with a berm, neutralize in controlled passes, and seal residue with disposal metadata.

title: Prepare a Buffer Solution

title: Adjust Solution pH
description: Plan titration corrections, execute micro-adjustments, and log every correction cycle until the buffer is in spec.

title: Measure Solution pH
description: Calibrate pH tools, condition a sample aliquot, and produce a traceable pH reading card with method notes.

title: Form a Precipitate
description: Pre-stage reagent stoichiometry, run controlled precipitation, then wash/filter solids for clean analytical samples.

title: Demonstrate a Safe Chemical Reaction
description: Run a documented baking-soda and vinegar reaction with explicit equipment checks, measured additions, and logged containment outcomes.

title: Refine Stevia Crystals
description: Seed stevia concentrate for crystallization, then dry crystals under airflow/vacuum to a stable moisture target.

title: Extract Stevia Sweetener
description: Dry and mill stevia biomass, run warm ethanol-water extraction, and clarify filtrate before collecting extract.

title: Taste Test Stevia Crystals
description: Calibrate sensory panel baselines, run blind stevia comparisons, and issue a structured panel scorecard.

title: Forge the Completionist Award III
description: Build a grand mixed-discipline trophy that celebrates your full v3 journey: printed structure, fine woodworking base, soldered electronics, robotics motion, and a living planter crown.

title: Catalog Your Trophy
description: Log your Completionist Award II with a recorded serial, location, and audit-ready timestamp.

title: Show Off Your Trophy

description: Keep your Completionist Award II shiny and ready for close-up photos.

title: Check for New Quests
description: Set and verify a weekly reminder so new quests never sneak past your displayed award run.

title: Congrats on finishing all the quests available in v2!
description: Print, plate, and assemble a real Completionist Award II for your shelf.

title: Check Compost Temperature

description: Screen compost to remove large chunks for a fine finished mix.

title: Turn Your Compost Bucket
description: Aerate the compost by stirring the mix so microbes stay active.

description: Configure GitHub Actions to run tests whenever you push.

description: Install Fail2ban to ban repeated failed logins.

description: Prevent logs from filling your server by compressing old files.

description: Host your own Docker images on the cluster.

title: Blink an LED with Arduino
description: Learn to program a microcontroller by blinking an LED.

title: Check a battery pack's voltage

description: Use a digital multimeter's diode mode to find which lead of a loose 5 mm LED is positive. Disconnect power, work on a dry non-conductive surface, wear safety goggles, and only use the meter's built-in diode test.

description: Use a photoresistor and Arduino to measure ambient brightness.

description: Use a digital multimeter to measure the current through a basic LED circuit.

description: Use a digital multimeter to confirm a loose resistor's value. Disconnect all power, keep metal jewelry off, set components on a dry non-conductive surface, and wear safety goggles.

description: Adjust LED brightness using a potentiometer and an Arduino.

title: Verify resistor color bands
description: Confirm a resistor's value by decoding its color bands before installing it in a circuit.

description: Use the Arduino IDE's Servo library 'Sweep' example to rotate a hobby servo from 0° to 180°.

description: Build and verify an LED harness with staged solder checks, safety pauses, and rework loops before sign-off.

description: Repair a snapped jumper lead with staged prep, splice verification, and fault-recovery loops under solder safety controls.

description: Generate a chart from your thermistor log using Python.

description: Run a GFCI test cycle with explicit pass bounds, anomaly classification, and mandatory safety re-test before closure.

description: Wire a thermistor to your Arduino and log temperature values.

title: Calibrate a Thermometer
description: Use water baths to verify your thermometer's accuracy.

title: Tin a Soldering Iron

description: Split 5 V to about 2.5 V using 220 Ω and 10 kΩ resistors on a Breadboard.

description: Cycle your 200 Wh battery pack with solar to keep it healthy.

description: Expand your solar setup with a 1 kWh storage pack and enclosure.

description: Ferment kitchen scraps into methane for cooking.

description: Wire and configure a charge controller to safely charge your 200 Wh battery.

title: Accrue 100,000 dSolar

title: Accrue 10,000 dSolar
description: Push the boundaries of energy production! To complete this quest, have at least 10,000 dSolar in your inventory.

title: Accrue 1,000 dSolar
description: Reach increasingly higher levels of energy production! To complete this quest, have at least 1,000 dSolar in your inventory.

title: Accumulate 1,000 dWatt
description: Boost your energy potential! To unlock this quest's reward, accumulate at least 1,000 dWatt in your inventory.

title: Accumulate 10,000 dWatt
description: Supercharge your energy reserves! To claim your prize, gather at least 10,000 dWatt in your inventory.

title: Collect a Stunning 100,000 dWatt
description: Ascent to greater heights in energy collection! To be rewarded, amass a significant 100,000 dWatt.

title: Achieve an Astounding 1,000,000 dWatt
description: Reach the pinnacle of energy gathering! Secure your legacy by accumulating 1,000,000 dWatt.

title: Amass an Unbelievable 10,000,000 dWatt
description: Challenge the very fabric of what's considered possible! Conquer this monumental task by stockpiling 10,000,000 dWatt.

description: Convert your battery's DC output into AC for household gear.

description: Rotate your 200 Wh kit to follow the sun.

description: Supplement your solar setup with power from the breeze.

description: Swap an old bandage for a fresh one to keep a minor cut clean.

description: Use a biohazard bag to discard used bandages and wash up.

description: Clear out old items so your first aid kit stays reliable.

description: Replace used supplies so you're ready for emergencies.

description: Sit upright, lean forward, and pinch the soft part of your nose with sterile gauze. Wear nitrile gloves, never tilt your head back, and escalate to urgent care when warning signs persist.

description: Learn the real DSPACE test commands before opening a PR.
